phaser.resolutionNote: Legacy games/find_the_dog pins phaser ^3.90.0, hoisted to the ROOT node_modules. The phaser proof game pins exact 4.2.1 so it installs NESTED and wins resolution from both the proof runtime and its authoring/ project. Proven by tools/phaser-shell/test/phaser-resolution.test.mjs.

laneToolchainFrozen.rule: U1 preseeds the toolchain @fabrikav2/phaser-shell (and its U5/U6 authoring/bundling code) will consume, pinned to the existing root ranges so no lane may reopen the single root package-lock. U5/U6 add scripts/source ONLY — never dependencies. `phaser-shell` uses the TypeScript compiler API for AST work; no separate parser library is introduced.

workspaceFreeze.rule: The root package.json workspaces list and the single root package-lock.json are frozen shared surfaces after U1; a later dependency reopens the shared integration gate and invalidates downstream evidence.
workspaceFreeze.capacitorNote: Capacitor packages are declared per-game only when U10 wires the dev-only Android shell; U1 freezes the accepted versions without adding game-level dependencies.
